description: Act as a quantitative developer to create and validate a new trading strategy in NinjaTrader 8. Modify the 'SampleMACrossover' strategy to use Exponential Moving Averages (EMA) instead of Simple Moving Averages (SMA) and save it as a new strategy named 'SampleEMACrossover'. Ensure the parameters remain Fast=10 and Slow=25. Compile the strategy and validate it by running a backtest on SPY using a Daily interval for the period Jan 1, 2023, to Dec 31, 2023. Save the workspace to persist your configuration. Note: The environment has real market data for SPY pre-loaded.
